metadata.source: DOE Office of Science, University of Illinois

properties.name: Argonne National Laboratory
properties.nlic_relevance: Advanced reactor design, nuclear fuel cycle R&D, materials science, nuclear engineering workforce. Home to the Advanced Photon Source and multiple nuclear research programs.

properties.name: Fermi National Accelerator Laboratory
properties.nlic_relevance: Materials science, superconducting technology, particle physics expertise applicable to advanced nuclear systems. Major DOE research workforce.

properties.name: University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign
properties.nlic_relevance: Department of Nuclear, Plasma, and Radiological Engineering. Nuclear workforce pipeline. Advanced reactor and fuel cycle research programs.
